title: Cutlery Guzzler Modpack
body: This is a modpack made by the choice of the Cutlery Guzzlers.(mostly me) This modpack contains Essential for easy multiplayer and emotes, along with some qol features. It also includes origins if you and your friends play around with having powers. There is also Simple Voice Chat for dynamic in game voice chat. Along with journeymap and a vein digging it makes for an incredible experience. You also don't need a supercomputer to use this because of the inclusion of Sodium, but if you do have a supercomputer there is also built-in Iris and 2 shaders for you. The 2 shaders are Complementary Shaders and Insanity Shaders for a more horror feel. There's also Biomes O' Plenty if you like new custom biomes.
